Struct Token

Namespace
CXEX.Lang.Lexer
Assembly
CXEX.Lang.dll

A lexed token. Text is the exact source slice; for IntLiteral, Value holds the parsed number.

public readonly record struct Token : IEquatable<Token>

A lexed token. Text is the exact source slice; for IntLiteral, Value holds the parsed number.
